data.title: Bank of New York Mellon held more than $13 million in Bitcoin ETFs as of Q4 last year
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Bank of New York Mellon (BNY Mellon) disclosed in a recent filing with the U.S. SEC that as of the end of the fourth quarter of last year, it held more than $13 million in Bitcoin ETFs, including 115,108 shares of WisdomTree BTCW, worth about $11.87 million, and 25,309 shares of BlackRock IBIT, worth about $1.4 million.

data.title: Binance to Support Enjin Coin (ENJ) Network Upgrade
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Binance is expected to suspend the token recharge and withdrawal services of the Enjin Coin (ENJ) network at 23:00 (Eastern Time Zone 8) on February 24, 2025 to support its network upgrade.
The project will upgrade the network at block height 9,098,986 (estimated to be 00:00 on February 25, 2025 (Eastern Time Zone 8).

data.title: Hong Kong Securities and Futures Commission CEO: Crypto Regulatory Roadmap to be released today, focusing on protecting investors and covering different participants
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Julia Leung, CEO of the Securities and Futures Commission of Hong Kong (SFC), said in Consensus Hong Kong 2025 that the US SEC has made rapid progress in the field of crypto regulation, and Hong Kong is also actively thinking about its position in the crypto wave.
Crypto regulations in other regions cannot adapt to Hong Kong. Starting in 2023, Hong Kong has established a licensing system to regulate the development of trading platforms in Hong Kong. In addition, financial service roles such as banks and brokers also adopt a licensing system. Crypto asset custody and OTC, as well as the issuance of crypto financial products, are all regulated.
This afternoon, the SFC will release a regulatory roadmap that focuses on protecting investors, covering different participants in the ecosystem, and being consistent, which will make corporate compliance clearer.

data.title: BitMart will launch Based Froc (FROC)
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, BitMart will launch Based Froc (FROC) at 12:00 (Eastern Time Zone 8) on February 19, and the FROC/USDT trading pair will be opened.
According to the introduction, FROC is the Meme coin on Base.

data.title: Sol Strategies, the “Solana version of MicroStrategy”, increased its holdings by 12,456 SOL
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Sol Strategies, a company listed on the Canadian Stock Exchange, bought 12,456 SOLs, bringing its total holdings to 226,798 SOLs, worth 64.2 million Canadian dollars. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Cathie Wood's ARK Innovation ETF as an Economic Indicator
data.description: According to Odaily, macro analyst @TomasOnMarkets has highlighted that Cathie Wood's ARK Innovation ETF (ARKK) has historically served as a leading indicator for the ISM Purchasing Managers' Index. This ETF is seen as a direct bet on the expansion of economic cycles. Notably, over the past few years, ARKK's performance has closely mirrored that of Bitcoin, particularly in the last year. However, this correlation has recently diverged, with ARKK experiencing a strong rally while Bitcoin has declined by 10% over the past three weeks. Based on a rough correlation estimate using percentage change charts, Bitcoin's current price should be above $110,000, reflecting ARKK's recent surge.

data.title: Due to Solana’s poor performance, the chain’s weekly transaction volume has continued to shrink since mid-January
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to DefiLlama data, weekly on-chain transaction volume has been declining since mid-January, gradually falling from $173 billion to about $90 billion last week. Solana's weekly transaction volume has fallen the most during this period.
From January 11 to 17, DEX transaction volume hit an all-time high of $173 billion per week. Solana was the main driver of this trend, with more than $97.5 billion in on-chain transaction activity.
The following week, on-chain transaction volume remained stable, with DEX transaction volume of nearly $171 billion. BSC played a key role, with its weekly transaction volume increasing by 76% to nearly $30 billion.
However, DEXs failed to hold their ground in the last week of January, with volumes falling to nearly $120 billion, a 30% decrease, a significant move that was also relevant to Solana, as the network’s weekly volume fell by nearly $40 billion, while other blockchains’ volumes remained similar to the previous week.
Weekly volumes continued to shrink in the first week of February. DEXs totaled $107.4 billion, with Solana’s volume falling by nearly $10 billion. Weekly on-chain volume fell below $100 billion for the first time in five weeks, at just $90 billion between February 8 and February 14.
Additionally, for the first time since early October, Solana did not lead weekly trading activity. Nearly $30 billion was traded on BSC, while $26.2 billion was traded on Solana. (CryptoSlate)

data.title: Vietnam Plans To Establish Regional And International Financial Centers
data.description:
According to PANews, Vietnam's Ministry of Planning and Investment is seeking feedback on a draft resolution from the National Assembly regarding the establishment of regional and international financial centers in the country. The proposal suggests that from July 1, 2026, the trading of crypto assets and cryptocurrencies will be officially implemented within these financial centers. The draft outlines that the regional financial center will be located in Da Nang City, while the international financial center will be based in Ho Chi Minh City. 

Article 12 of the draft addresses monetary policy, banking, and foreign exchange management policies for the financial centers. Additionally, commercial banks are expected to adopt a digital banking model starting January 1, 2026. Article 13 of the draft discusses a controlled trial (sandbox) policy for business models applying financial technology. The Financial Center Management Committee will have the authority to license, manage, assess impacts, and manage risks related to controlled trials in financial technology activities, including platforms for trading crypto assets and cryptocurrencies. The implementation of crypto asset and cryptocurrency trading within the financial centers is set to begin on July 1, 2026.

data.title: FTX creditor representative Sunil suggested that compensated users avoid participating in Meme coin speculation on the Solana chain
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Sunil Kavuri, a representative of FTX creditors, said that the completion of FTX creditor compensation of less than $50,000 may bring a sense of closure to some former customers, and the process has just begun.
Kavuri said that FTX estate still holds more than $16 billion in assets, which will be used later to repay creditors with claims worth more than $50,000. Kavuri is one of them, and he lost $2 million when the exchange collapsed.
Kavuri warned customers who received compensation to avoid the Meme coin trenches and carefully keep their wealth, pointing out that Meme coins such as TRUMP and LIBRA have caused some traders to lose a lot of money in recent weeks.
Kavuri said when recalling his advice to FTX creditors: "You missed the bull market, but don't gamble away your money. I have posted a lot of posts about carefully handling FTX compensation."
The recent distribution was assisted by cryptocurrency exchange Kraken and custody service provider BitGo. However, in the process, many people sold their claims to investment institutions that specialize in purchasing bankruptcy claims. Nearly half of the claims that were to be repaid on Tuesday have been acquired by investment institutions. "Some people sold the tokens because of emotional distress," Kavuri said, adding that some buyers of FTX claims bought the tokens at prices as low as 10 cents per dollar. He said: "I have heard of at least three people committing suicide, and many others have been hospitalized for panic attacks or are taking antidepressants." (Decrypt)
